_comment: Temporal Fusion Layer Configuration - The Bull Machine's Sense of Time
_description: Adjusts fusion weights based on temporal confluence across 4 time-based systems

temporal_fusion.description: Master enable flag for temporal fusion layer
temporal_fusion._fib_comment: Fibonacci bar counts for time projections from pivots
temporal_fusion._fib_tolerance_comment: ±3 bars window for Fibonacci hit detection
temporal_fusion._gann_tolerance_comment: ±2 bars window for Gann vibration hit detection

emotional_rsi_thresholds._comment: Wall Street Cheat Sheet RSI mapping

fib_time.description: Fibonacci time clusters from Wyckoff events

gann_cycles.description: Gann vibration numbers from major events

enable_temporal_in_config.description: Add to your engine config to enable temporal fusion

validate_historical.description: Validate temporal confluence on historical events

_philosophy: Time is pressure, not prediction. High confluence zones indicate when multiple time cycles align, creating pressure for price resolution. This layer does NOT predict moves - it detects when signals deserve higher conviction.
_integration_point: Temporal adjustment occurs AFTER Wyckoff boosts, BEFORE soft filters in ArchetypeLogic.detect()
